data.description:
Learn the theory and practical application of machine learning concepts in this comprehensive course for beginners.

рҹ”— Learning resources: https://github.com/ayush714/ML001-Project-Sources-Code-and-Learning-Materials
рҹ’» Code: https://github.com/ayush714/ML001-Project-Sources-Code-and-Learning-Materials

вңҸпёҸ Course developed by Ayush Singh. Check out his channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/neweraa

вқӨпёҸ Try interactive AI courses we love, right in your browser: https://scrimba.com/freeCodeCamp-AI (Made possible by a grant from our friends at Scrimba)

вӯҗпёҸ Course Contents вӯҗпёҸ
вҢЁпёҸ (0:00:00) Course Introduction
вҢЁпёҸ (0:04:34) Fundamentals of Machine Learning
вҢЁпёҸ (0:25:22) Supervised Learning and Unsupervised Learning In Depth
вҢЁпёҸ (0:35:39) Linear Regression
вҢЁпёҸ (1:07:06) Logistic Regression
вҢЁпёҸ (1:24:12) Project: House Price Predictor
вҢЁпёҸ (1:45:16) Regularization
вҢЁпёҸ (2:01:12) Support Vector Machines
вҢЁпёҸ (2:29:55) Project: Stock Price Predictor
вҢЁпёҸ (3:05:55) Principal Component Analysis
вҢЁпёҸ (3:29:14) Learning Theory
вҢЁпёҸ (3:47:38) Decision Trees
вҢЁпёҸ (4:58:19) Ensemble Learning
вҢЁпёҸ (5:53:28) Boosting, pt 1
вҢЁпёҸ (6:11:16) Boosting, pt 2
вҢЁпёҸ (6:44:10) Stacking Ensemble Learning
вҢЁпёҸ (7:09:52) Unsupervised Learning, pt 1
вҢЁпёҸ (7:26:58) Unsupervised Learning, pt 2
вҢЁпёҸ (7:55:16) K-Means
вҢЁпёҸ (8:20:21) Hierarchical Clustering
вҢЁпёҸ (8:50:28) Project: Heart Failure Prediction
вҢЁпёҸ (9:33:29) Project: Spam/Ham Detector
